data_source: Note: GitHub Discussions GraphQL requires gh CLI or direct API token. This placeholder was generated from MCP-available data. Run `python3 scripts/analyze_discussions.py` after `gh api graphql` to refresh.
note: Discussions data unavailable in this run (no gh CLI). The analyze_discussions.py script is ready for environments with gh CLI access.

known_active_discussion.title: [FAQ&反馈]: 划词助手 / Selection Assistant
known_active_discussion.note: Highest-comment thread in the repo — effectively a discussion hub

script_instructions.fetch_cmd: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } labels(first: 10) { nodes { name } } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }' > /tmp/gh_discussions.json
